criteria.name: trend_strength
criteria.description: Category is growing in downloads, revenue, search, social attention, or marketplace demand.

criteria.name: pain_intensity
criteria.description: Users repeatedly complain about the same problem or actively search for alternatives.

criteria.name: competitor_weakness
criteria.description: Existing apps are weak in UX, price, trust, niche focus, localization, or workflow completion.

criteria.name: monetization_proof
criteria.description: Competitors charge, users pay, marketplace listings show MRR/profit, or B2B buyers have budget.

criteria.name: mvp_feasibility
criteria.description: A useful MVP can be built by a solo/small team in 2-6 weeks.

criteria.name: distribution_potential
criteria.description: There are clear ASO keywords, communities, creator channels, partnerships, or viral loops.

criteria.name: defensibility_acquisition_value
criteria.description: The app can build useful data, audience, brand, integrations, SEO, or acquisition value.

criteria.name: risk_penalty
criteria.description: Subtract for legal, platform, API, privacy, medical, financial, copyright, or moderation risk.
